div.p: Self-clocking segment coalescing to reduce small packets

ol.li: Client sends small request (fits in one segment)
Server receives, but delays ACK (40ms typical)
Client has response data, but Nagle blocks it
Client waits for ACK that server is delaying
Deadlock until delayed ACK timer fires

div.p: 2. Write in full MSS chunks Application ensures writes ≥ MSS (Only first/last segments are small)
3. Request/Response pattern Send all data, then read (Don't interleave reads/writes)
